document.docAuthor: Lin, Xiao-Bin, Chen, Xi & Peng, Zhong
document.masterDocTitle: A new species and additional records of Lobrathium Mulsant & Rey (Coleoptera Staphylinidae: Paederinae) from southern China

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A new species and additional records of Lobrathium Mulsant & Rey (Coleoptera Staphylinidae: Paederinae) from southern China

bibRefCitation.refString: Bernhauer, M. (1931) Zur Staphylinidenfauna des chinesischen Reiches. Wiener Entomologische Zeitung, 48, 125 - 132.

subSubSection.paragraph:

CHINA

Comment. The above records from Chongqing and Jiangxi represent new province records.
